levers.impact_description: Replacing lagging sales data with Google Trends real-time signals reduces forecast error by ~30%, cutting inventory from 45d → 31.5d. Carrying cost saved on ₹180 Cr excess inventory.
levers.ai_tool: Google Trends API (pytrends) + Python calibration model
levers.mckinsey_gap: McKinsey uses proprietary POS data from 2.7L retailers in real time. Our agent uses normalized Google Trends (relative index, not unit counts). Gap: calibration accuracy. Fix: regression model once 90 days of sales data available.

levers.impact_description: Control tower visibility (Google Sheets + Zapier dashboard) reduces blind spots across 180,000 outlets. 40% stockout reduction recovers ~₹2.9 Cr in annual margin.
levers.ai_tool: Google Sheets Control Plane + Zapier 3-pipe automation
levers.mckinsey_gap: McKinsey deploys IoT sensors + RFID at every distributor point. Our agent relies on manual ERP exports piped via Zapier. Gap: real-time vs 24-hour lag. Fix: ERP API integration (Phase 2).

levers.impact_description: AI-driven lateral transshipments reduce dead stock from ₹180 Cr → ₹50 Cr. ₹32.5 Cr carrying cost saved annually. ₹130 Cr working capital unlocked.
levers.mckinsey_gap: McKinsey runs a full minimum-cost flow optimization (OR-Tools/Gurobi). Our agent uses a greedy heuristic (excess→deficit matching). Gap: sub-optimal by ~5-10% vs true minimum cost. Fix: add scipy.optimize or OR-Tools (Phase 3).

levers.impact_description: Dynamic route selection + delivery clustering saves ~12% of estimated ₹189 Cr logistics spend. Lead time compression 3d → 2d enables faster dead stock rescue.
levers.mckinsey_gap: McKinsey integrates live GPS, traffic, and carrier APIs into an ML model. Our agent uses a static lead-time table. Gap: biggest gap in this replication — we do not have live logistics data. Fix: Google Maps Distance Matrix API (free tier: 10K calls/month).

levers.impact_description: LCP at 3.8s (60% above 2.5s benchmark) causes ~8% excess bounce rate. Against ₹210 Cr ad spend, this leaks ~₹65.5 Cr/year in wasted ad reach. AI image optimization (drop LCP to <2s) recovers ₹49.1 Cr.
levers.ai_tool: PageSpeed Insights API + AI image compression recommendation
levers.mckinsey_gap: McKinsey runs A/B testing on 200+ page variants with statistical significance. Our agent runs a single PageSpeed audit. Gap: no A/B test, no multivariate analysis. Fix: Google Optimize (free) for basic A/B testing.
